channel.title: Docker on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on Arrans github.io

item.title: Dokploy/dokploy
item.description: Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

item.title: portainer/portainer
item.description: Making Docker and Kubernetes management easy.

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.

item.title: amir20/dozzle
item.description: Realtime log viewer for containers. Supports Docker, Swarm and K8s.

item.title: ministackorg/ministack
item.description: Ministack: Free, open-source local AWS emulator - 35+ services, Terraform compatible, real databases. Free forever. MIT licensed.

item.title: argoproj/argo-cd
item.description: Declarative Continuous Deployment for Kubernetes

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: louislam/uptime-kuma
item.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

item.title: metacall/core
item.description: MetaCall: The ultimate polyglot programming experience.

item.title: louislam/dockge
item.description: A fancy, easy-to-use and reactive self-hosted docker compose.yaml stack-oriented manager

item.title: meshery/meshery
item.description: Meshery, the cloud native manager

item.title: 89luca89/distrobox
item.description: Use any linux distribution inside your terminal. Enable both backward and forward compatibility with software and freedom to use whatever distribution you’re more comfortable with. Mirror available at: https://gitlab.com/89luca89/distrobox

item.title: getarcaneapp/arcane
item.description: Modern Docker Management, Designed for Everyone

item.title: rhizomatics/updates2mqtt
item.description: Automated checks and optional upgrades of packages via MQTT with Home Assistant compatibility

item.title: GoogleContainerTools/distroless
item.description: 🥑 Language focused docker images, minus the operating system.

item.title: ancsemi/Haven
item.description: Self-hosted private chat — No cloud, no telemetry, no Big Tech. Discord alternative that runs on your own machine.

item.title: glanceapp/glance
item.description: A self-hosted dashboard that puts all your feeds in one place

item.title: donetick/donetick
item.description: Donetick an open-source, user-friendly app for managing tasks and chores, featuring customizable options to help you and others stay organized

item.title: CodesWhat/drydock
item.description: Open source container update monitoring — 23 registries, 20 notification triggers, audit log, OIDC auth, Prometheus metrics, and a modern dashboard.

item.title: m1k1o/neko
item.description: A self hosted virtual browser that runs in docker and uses WebRTC.

item.title: Finsys/dockhand
item.description: Dockhand - Docker management you will like.

item.title: bitwarden/server
item.description: Bitwarden infrastructure/backend (API, database, Docker, etc).

item.title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.title: containerd/containerd
item.description: An open and reliable container runtime

item.title: DrewThomasson/ebook2audiobook
item.description: Generate audiobooks from e-books, voice cloning & 1158+ languages!

item.title: dockur/macos
item.description: MacOS inside a Docker container.

item.title: sickcodes/Docker-OSX
item.description: Run macOS VM in a Docker! Run near native OSX-KVM in Docker! X11 Forwarding! CI/CD for OS X Security Research! Docker mac Containers.

item.title: TwiN/gatus
item.description: Automated developer-oriented status page with alerting and incident support

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: F1bonacc1/process-compose
item.description: Process Compose is a simple and flexible scheduler and orchestrator to manage non-containerized applications.

item.title: aliasvault/aliasvault
item.description: Privacy-first password manager with built-in email aliasing. Fully encrypted and self-hostable.

item.title: kubernetes-sigs/kind
item.description: Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes

item.title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
item.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

item.title: crazy-max/diun
item.description: Receive notifications when an image is updated on a Docker registry

item.title: Smaug6739/Alexandrie
item.description: Self-hosted knowledge base with extended Markdown, Kanban, OIDC/SSO, PWA & offline support. Deploy in one command.

item.title: dagger/dagger
item.description: Automation engine to build, test and ship any codebase. Runs locally, in CI, or directly in the cloud

item.title: FoxxMD/multi-scrobbler
item.description: Scrobble plays from multiple sources to multiple clients

item.title: xpipe-io/xpipe
item.description: Access your entire server infrastructure from your local desktop

item.title: Termix-SSH/Termix
item.description: Termix is a web-based server management platform with SSH terminal, tunneling, and file editing capabilities.

item.title: Tikam02/DevOps-Guide
item.description: DevOps Guide - Development to Production all configurations with basic notes to debug efficiently.

item.title: claabs/epicgames-freegames-node
item.description: Automatically login and find available free games the Epic Games Store. Sends you a prepopulated checkout link so you can complete the checkout after logging in. Supports multiple accounts, login sessions, and scheduled runs.

item.title: authelia/authelia
item.description: The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps, now OpenID Certified™

item.title: dockur/windows
item.description: Windows inside a Docker container.

item.title: brufdev/many-notes
item.description: Markdown note-taking web application designed for simplicity

item.title: gabehf/Koito
item.description: Koito is a modern, themeable scrobbler that you can use with any program that scrobbles to a custom ListenBrainz URL

item.title: NilsIrl/dockerc
item.description: container image to single executable compiler

item.title: Forceu/Gokapi
item.description: Lightweight selfhosted Firefox Send alternative without public upload. AWS S3 supported.

item.title: voidauth/voidauth
item.description: Single Sign-On for Your Self-Hosted Universe

item.title: suitux/Tagr
item.description: Self-hosted web app for browsing, playing, and editing music file metadata. Features a three-panel UI to navigate your library, listen to tracks, and write tag changes directly back to audio files. Built with Next.js, React, Prisma + SQLite, and node-taglib-sharp.

item.title: linuxserver/docker-webtop
item.description: Ubuntu, Alpine, Arch, and Fedora based Webtop images, Linux in a web browser supporting popular desktop environments.

item.title: dutchcoders/transfer.sh
item.description: Easy and fast file sharing from the command-line.

item.title: nbr23/youtube-dl-server
item.description: Web / REST interface for downloading youtube videos onto a server.

item.title: AbdBarho/stable-diffusion-webui-docker
item.description: Easy Docker setup for Stable Diffusion with user-friendly UI

item.title: fat-tire/resolve
item.description: Container scripts to build and run DaVinci Resolve [Studio] for Linux using Docker or Podman

item.title: oldany/dropmind
item.description: Self-hosted capture layer to save anything from anywhere.

item.title: seanmorley15/AdventureLog
item.description: Self-hostable travel tracker and trip planner.

item.title: bunkeriot/BunkerM
item.description: 🚀 BunkerM: All-in-one Mosquitto MQTT management platform, featuring dynamic security, MQTT ACL management, monitoring,and AI integrations

item.title: hhftechnology/Dock-Dploy
item.description: A web-based tool for building, managing, and converting Docker Compose files, configuration files, and schedulers.

item.title: ahmetoner/whisper-asr-webservice
item.description: OpenAI Whisper ASR Webservice API

item.title: krallin/tini
item.description: A tiny but valid init for containers

item.title: AlexGustafsson/cupdate
item.description: A service to keep container images secure and up-to-date. Made for Kubernetes and Docker.

item.title: dockpeek/dockpeek
item.description: Easily access your Docker container web interfaces and keep them up to date — across all your hosts.

item.title: RA341/dockman
item.description: Yet another docker compose manager for homelabs

item.title: neonwatty/meme-search
item.description: The open source Meme Search Engine and Finder. Free and built to self-host locally with Python, Ruby, and Docker.

item.title: TheNickOfTime/handbrake-web
item.description: A self-hosted platform to use HandBrake on your headless devices via a bespoke web interface. Harness the processing power of multiple devices to work on a single queue.

item.title: shubh-io/DockMate
item.description: Dockmate: The open-source Docker TUI & Podman manager for terminal productivity. A fast, lightweight alternative to lazydocker built in Go.

item.title: Manan-Santoki/Backslash
item.description: Self-hostable, open-source LaTeX editor with live PDF preview and a full REST API.

item.title: EgalitarianMonkey/hometube
item.description: HomeTube is a friendly video downloader managing single video URL into organized content structure for automatic home media server experience.

item.title: sameersbn/docker-gitlab
item.description: Dockerized GitLab

item.title: polius/FileSync
item.description: Send files from one device to many in real-time.

item.title: ruanbekker/cheatsheets
item.description: My Cheatsheet Repository

item.title: xthursdayx/yacreaderlibrary-server-docker
item.description: Docker image running a headless version of YACReaderLibraryServer 📦

item.title: RealOrangeOne/docker-db-auto-backup
item.description: A script to automatically back up all databases running under docker on a host

item.title: VityaSchel/lufin
item.description: Read-only mirror of https://git.hloth.dev/hloth/lufin

item.title: antlafarge/jdownloader
item.description: Docker JDownloader 2 headless image (multi-arch) with automatic update.

item.title: ad-on-is/resticity
item.description: A beautiful cross-platform UI for restic backup.
